company.name: Tarqon Intelligence
company.description: Tarqon Intelligence is an AI-first engineering company that builds intelligent software systems for startups, researchers, healthcare organizations and enterprises.

services.name: AI Systems for Researchers
services.description: Private AI research assistants, RAG systems, literature review automation, scientific search and knowledge systems.

services.name: WhatsApp Automation
services.description: Lead qualification, customer support, appointment booking and automated business conversations.

services.name: Internal Tools
services.description: Custom CRMs, admin dashboards, workflow automation and operational software.

services.name: Full Stack Development
services.description: Production-ready SaaS platforms, scalable web applications and custom software.

services.name: Healthcare AI
services.description: Clinical decision support, multimodal AI, medical prediction systems and healthcare automation.

services.name: Research to Startup
services.description: Transforming academic research into deployable products and MVPs.

services.name: Data & AI Consulting
services.description: Data analysis, predictive modeling, forecasting and decision intelligence.
